_comment: Species: Black Tortoise (玄武) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Black Tortoise

canonical.appearance: Tortoise 20 m shell, shell black-jade with coiled snake-tail and snake-head neck
canonical.size: 20 m shell adult, 500000 jin; true form supports continents
canonical.behavior: Divine spirit beast of defense; supports continents in slumber; awakens for world-founding events
canonical.habitat: Xuan Wu country, deep ocean trenches, earth-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.diet: earth-attribute heavenly treasures, deep-sea beasts, continent-essence
canonical.relationships: Bonded to Xuan Wu imperial lineage; rival of White Tiger
canonical.bloodline: True Divine Beast lineage; one of Four Symbols
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: black_tortoise — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
